keyProperties.Default: The initial value of a control before the user specifies a different value.
keyProperties.Items: The source of data that contains the items that appear in the control.
keyProperties.Value: The column of data that you want to show in the control.
keyProperties.Selected: The data record that represents the selected item.
keyProperties.AllowEmptySelection: Whether the control can have no selected items.

additionalProperties.BorderColor: The color of a control's border.
additionalProperties.BorderStyle: Whether a control's border is Solid, Dashed, Dotted, or None.
additionalProperties.BorderThickness: The thickness of a control's border.
additionalProperties.ChevronBackground: The color behind the down arrow in a dropdown list.
additionalProperties.ChevronFill: The color of the down arrow in a dropdown list.
additionalProperties.Color: The color of text in a control.
additionalProperties.DisplayMode: Whether the control allows user input (Edit), only displays data (View), or is disabled (Disabled).
additionalProperties.Fill: The background color of a control.
additionalProperties.Font: The name of the family of fonts in which text appears.
additionalProperties.FontWeight: The weight of the text in a control: Bold, Semibold, Normal, or Lighter.
additionalProperties.Height: The distance between a control's top and bottom edges.
additionalProperties.Italic: Whether the text in a control is italic.
additionalProperties.OnChange: Actions to perform when the user changes the value of a control.
additionalProperties.OnSelect: Actions to perform when the user selects a control.
additionalProperties.Reset: Whether a control reverts to its default value.
additionalProperties.SelectedText: A string value that represents the selected item (Deprecated).
additionalProperties.SelectionColor: The text color of a selected item or items in a list.
additionalProperties.SelectionFill: The background color of a selected item or items in a list.
additionalProperties.Size: The font size of the text that appears on a control.
additionalProperties.Strikethrough: Whether a line appears through the text that appears on a control.
additionalProperties.TabIndex: Keyboard navigation order in relation to other controls.
additionalProperties.Tooltip: Explanatory text that appears when the user hovers over a control.
additionalProperties.Underline: Whether a line appears under the text that appears on a control.
additionalProperties.Visible: Whether a control appears or is hidden.
additionalProperties.Width: The distance between a control's left and right edges.
additionalProperties.X: The distance between the left edge of a control and its parent container.
additionalProperties.Y: The distance between the top edge of a control and its parent container.
